title: Failure Classification and Retry Budgets · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs failure classification and retry budgets from producer, broker, queue, delivery, Go runtime, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one protocol or concurrency misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a typed Go failure and retry policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify wrapped Go failures with errors.Is and errors.As, then combine typed cause evidence with bounded attempt, age, delay, cancellation, and terminal disposition.
Bound attempts, total age, delay, processing deadline, queue residence, and operator escalation as one retry budget; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Apply exponential backoff and jitter without blocking consumer slots or requeueing hot loops and preserve intended availability time; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Transient Permanent Ambiguous · changed case · Review Transient Permanent Ambiguous
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go messaging team handles case 1992 during table-driven topology review for a tenant migration. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify failures and enforce attempt, age, delay, and terminal retry budgets; keep message identity out of metric labels while preserving causal traces; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify wrapped Go failures with errors.Is and errors.As, then combine typed cause evidence with bounded attempt, age, delay, cancellation, and terminal disposition.

Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Record original identity, attempt, reason, first and next time, owner, budget, terminal disposition, and causal metrics without high-cardinality leaks; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Retry Observability Ownership, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Queue depth alone explains whether retries are healthy. In Go, wrapping every failure as retryable improves resilience.
